name: TomTom
description: TomTom map and traffic tiles (API key required).

metadata.commercial_notes: Commercial use allowed under TomTom terms.
metadata.constraints: verify provider availability and attribution requirements
metadata.rate_limit_notes: verify provider availability and attribution requirements
search_examples: find TomTom near a selected location
metadata.location_dependency: Depends on selected map extent or requested location.

license.name: tomtom attribution required where provider terms require it

account_setup.automation_reason: Third-party provider signup and key retrieval require external account, billing, MFA, CAPTCHA, or portal flows that are not stable product APIs.

steps.title: Create or sign in to the provider account
steps.description: Open the provider account page and complete signup or sign in.

steps.title: Create or select a project
steps.description: Create a project or application in the provider dashboard if required.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Generate an API key for the required geospatial APIs.

steps.title: Restrict the API key
steps.description: Apply provider-supported restrictions before saving the key.

steps.title: Save and validate in AEGIS
steps.description: Paste the key into AEGIS and run validation.

user_action_notes: Open the provider portal from AEGIS and complete account-controlled steps in the provider site.
Pause for any CAPTCHA, login, email verification, 2FA, billing, consent, or key-generation prompts.
Paste the generated API key back into AEGIS when the provider flow is complete.
safety_notes: AEGIS does not collect provider passwords, CAPTCHA responses, 2FA codes, recovery codes, or billing credentials.
Guided setup is experimental and best-effort; manual provider instructions remain the fallback.
